content: Reproducible research pipeline consensus: capture provenance transparently as pipelines execute (inputs, parameters, software/versions, intermediate + final outputs, timestamps/checksums) in a manifest; treat raw/source data as read-only and never mutate in place; write all derived outputs to a separate directory tree; use checksums/UUIDs to identify what produced which file. This is standard practice across bioinformatics (nf-core), data-science pipeline provenance (IBM research), and genomics workflow reproducibility studies.
